# AeroX — Virtual Wind Tunnel for Cyclists
> AeroX turns your smart trainer into a virtual wind tunnel. Measure your aerodynamic frontal area (CdA) in real time with a webcam, optimize your position, and gain up to 3 km/h.

## About
AeroX is a desktop application (macOS, Windows) that uses computer vision to measure a cyclist's frontal area in real time on a smart trainer. Founded by Olivier Demichel, former CNRS researcher and triathlete. Launching April 10, 2026.

## Main pages
- [Homepage FR](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/): Soufflerie virtuelle pour cyclistes indoor — mesure du CdA en temps réel
- [Homepage EN](https://aeroxbefaster.com/en/): Virtual wind tunnel for indoor cyclists — real-time CdA measurement
- [Bike Fitting FR](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/bike-fitting/): AeroX pour bike fitters professionnels — mesure aérodynamique en séance
- [Bike Fitting EN](https://aeroxbefaster.com/en/bike-fitting/): AeroX for professional bike fitters — aero measurement during fitting sessions
- [Our Story](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/team/): The team behind AeroX — Olivier Demichel and Milan Larivière
- [Method](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/method/): The science behind AeroX aerodynamic optimization

## Blog
- [Zwift vs AeroX](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/zwift-fr/): Why Zwift doesn't train your aerodynamics — and how AeroX fills the gap
- [Aero Gains in Numbers](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/aero-gain-chronometrique-fr/): How aerodynamic gains translate to real race time savings
- [Bike Fitting & Performance](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/BF-mesurer-fr/): Measuring aerodynamics during a professional bike fit session
- [Feel Your Aero](https://aeroxbefaster.com/en/blog/feel-aero-en/): Learning to feel aerodynamic position changes on the bike
- [Amstel Gold Race 2025](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/amstel-gold-race-2025-fr/): Analyse aérodynamique de l'Amstel Gold Race 2025
- [Aero Feedbacks](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/aero-feedbacks-fr/): Retours terrain sur l'optimisation aérodynamique avec AeroX
- [AeroX Innovation](https://aeroxbefaster.com/fr/blog/aerox-innovation-fr/): L'innovation technologique derrière la soufflerie virtuelle AeroX

## Key facts
- Measures CdA (coefficient of drag area) in real time via webcam and smart trainer
- Compatible with Wahoo Kickr, Elite Direto, Tacx Neo, Saris H3 and more
- Used by bike fitters on 3 continents (Brazil, USA, Europe)
- Typical gains: +2-3 km/h, -30 to 40 W savings at same speed
- No wind tunnel needed — a simple webcam is enough
- Available on macOS and Windows
- Starting from 109 EUR/month, launching April 10, 2026
